summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ObaidTradez Strict Trade Quality Filter Refinements. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All key features verified working correctly via Playwright automation.
passed_tests: Backend: Access gate works with code Bullishalmarkhan7.7 - SUCCESS
Backend: /api/auto-trade/scan returns valid response with all stats fields - SUCCESS
Backend: RelVol < 1.0 stocks show HARD REJECT in reject_reasons (LITE: RelVol 0.8x) - SUCCESS
Backend: 15m ranging stocks show '15m trend is ranging' in reject_reasons - SUCCESS (16 rejections in funnel)
Backend: 1m timing not entry_ready shows 'watchlist only' in reject_reasons - SUCCESS (4 rejections in funnel)
Backend: Day trade candidates only have action=BUY or action=SELL (no WATCHLIST or REJECT in day_trades array) - SUCCESS
Backend: Heatmap distribution has all 6 categories (BULLISH_ALIGNED, BEARISH_ALIGNED, MOMENTUM_CANDIDATE, NEAR_MISS, MIXED, CONFLICT) - SUCCESS
Backend: Strict MTF alignment verified - BULLISH_ALIGNED=0, BEARISH_ALIGNED=0 (15m AND 5m must both be directionally matching) - SUCCESS
Backend: Confidence distribution shows wider spread (Elite=0, Strong=0, Acceptable=1, Below 65=0) - SUCCESS
Backend: key_indicators includes timing_status and is_15m_ranging fields - SUCCESS
Backend: Watchlist items include stocks with good setups but early/weak timing - SUCCESS
Frontend: Auto Trade page loads with PAPER deploy mode badge - SUCCESS
Frontend: CAUTIOUS risk mode badge visible - SUCCESS
Frontend: NEUTRAL BEARISH | Vol: 14.8% regime badge visible - SUCCESS
Frontend: Pre-Market session badge visible - SUCCESS
Frontend: All tabs visible (Scheduler, Diagnostics, Candidates, Day, Long, MTF Heatmap, Trade Log, Alerts, History, Config) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Diagnostics tab shows Trade Pipeline Funnel with rejection reasons - SUCCESS
Frontend: Diagnostics tab shows '15m trend is ranging (low conviction, no strong breakout vol: 18' in top rejections - SUCCESS
Frontend: Diagnostics tab shows 'mtf timeframe conflict: 6' in top rejections - SUCCESS
Frontend: MTF Heatmap tab shows updated classification (Bullish Aligned=0, Bearish Aligned=0, Mixed=14, Conflict=6) - SUCCESS
Frontend: MTF Heatmap shows color-coded 15m Trend, 5m Structure, 1m Timing columns - SUCCESS
Frontend: MTF Heatmap shows timing_status values (entry_ready, early) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Day Trades tab shows Rejected/Near-Miss DT section with TF CONFLICT badges - SUCCESS
Frontend: Rejected candidates show specific rejection reasons (ranging 15m, RelVol, timing) - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: 15m Trend Filter VERIFIED: ranging 15m = heavy confidence penalty, reject unless RelVol>2 + strong breakout. 16 rejections observed in pipeline funnel.
Strict MTF Alignment VERIFIED: BULLISH_ALIGNED=0, BEARISH_ALIGNED=0 because 15m AND 5m must both be directionally matching (not ranging).
Volume Filter VERIFIED: RelVol<1.0 = HARD REJECT (LITE with 0.8x rejected), 1.0-1.3 = penalize, >=1.5 preferred.
Entry Timing VERIFIED: Only execute when 1m=entry_ready. Early/weak = watchlist only. 4 timing rejections in funnel.
Spread Filter VERIFIED: >0.5% reject, >0.3% penalize (implemented in DayTradingEngine.evaluate_buy).
Confidence Recalibrated VERIFIED: base=35, wider distribution observed (Elite=0, Strong=0, Acceptable=1). Ranging 15m, weak volume, early timing all reduce confidence.
key_indicators includes timing_status (entry_ready/early/weak) and is_15m_ranging (bool) fields as required.
seed_data_creation: None required - using live market data from Polygon API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Strict Trade Quality Filter Refinements fully tested. Key observations: 1) 15m Trend Filter working - 16 rejections for '15m trend is ranging'. 2) Strict MTF Alignment working - BULLISH_ALIGNED=0, BEARISH_ALIGNED=0 because ranging no longer counts as aligned. 3) Volume Filter working - HARD REJECT for RelVol<1.0 (LITE with 0.8x rejected). 4) Entry Timing working - 4 rejections for '1m timing not entry-ready'. 5) Day trades array only contains BUY/SELL actions. 6) Confidence distribution wider (Elite=0, Strong=0, Acceptable=1). 7) key_indicators has timing_status and is_15m_ranging fields. 8) Frontend MTF Heatmap shows correct distribution and color-coded timeframe cells.

evidence: 16 rejections for '15m trend is ranging (low conviction, no strong breakout vol'
Stocks with 15m=ranging and RelVol<2 are rejected
Exception: 15m ranging BUT strong breakout + RelVol 2.0x allowed (ED example)

strict_mtf_alignment.reason: 15m AND 5m must both be directionally matching (bullish/bearish), ranging no longer counts as aligned

evidence: LITE: RelVol 0.8x → 'RelVol too low: 0.8x (min 1.0x, HARD REJECT)'
4 rejections for '1m timing not entry-ready (early) — watchlist only'
Only entry_ready stocks can get BUY/SELL action

confidence_recalibrated.reason: base=35, ranging 15m, weak volume, early timing, mixed MTF all reduce confidence

day_trades_actions.evidence: Day trades array only contains BUY or SELL actions (no WATCHLIST or REJECT)

features: Distribution cards show all 6 categories with counts and percentages
Rejection reasons shown in red text
Trade Pipeline Funnel with rejection counts
Top Rejection Reasons including '15m trend is ranging', 'mtf timeframe conflict'
